description: Analysis of SOTA techniques vs baseline. Baseline: ~1.22 BPB. SOTA: 1.1147 BPB. Key improvements identified: (1) LeakyReLU(0.5)² instead of ReLU² (-0.003 BPB), (2) BigramHash 3072x112 (-0.005 BPB), (3) XSA all layers (-0.003 BPB), (4) Parameter Banking+Parallel Muon (speed), (5) GPTQ int6 + AR calibration (-0.008 BPB from quantization), (6) EMA 0.997 + SWA every 50 (-0.003 BPB), (7) Partial RoPE 16/64 dims, (8) LN Scale 1/sqrt(layer+1), (9) Warmdown 4000 iters, (10) Late QAT threshold 0.15. Total estimated improvement: baseline 1.2244 -> estimate 1.10-1.12 BPB range.
Baseline training working on RTX 2050. 500 iters in 300s, loss 6.19→4.40, val_bpb 3.61→2.52

findings: Training converges well: val_bpb from 3.61 to 2.52 in 300s
Memory fits on RTX 2050 with these params
asi.hypothesis: Baseline working on RTX 2050 with seq_len=512, batch_tokens=8192

description: Extended to 1000 iters. val_bpb 3.18→2.28, best so far

findings: Training still converging well at 1000 iters
